global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and long, narrow wings. It has a predominantly dark sooty brown plumage with a lighter grayish head and neck. The bird features a slender, hooked black bill and a distinctive white eye-ring.

part_details.plumage: Dark sooty brown with a smooth texture
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, and pointed, dark brown
part_details.eye-ring: Distinctive white circle around the eye
part_details.head: Grayish with a smooth texture

spatial_relations: The long wings extend from the sides of the streamlined body
The slender bill protrudes from the front of the grayish head
The white eye-ring encircles the eye on the head
